title: jumellea brachycentra
intro: Jumellea brachycentra is a species of orchid native to Madagascar, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, Jumellea brachycentra has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Jumellea brachycentra typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots or rhizomes, which can be consumed orally or used topically for therapeutic purposes.
